hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); case "$f" in */backend/src/*.ts) d="${f%%/backend/src/*}/backend"; tsccmd="npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json" ;; */frontend/src/*.ts|*/frontend/src/*.tsx) d="${f%%/frontend/src/*}/frontend"; tsccmd="npx tsc -b" ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; cd "$d" || exit 0; out=$($tsccmd 2>&1) || { echo "typecheck failed:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }; out=$(npx eslint "$f" 2>&1) || { echo "eslint failed:" >&2; echo "$out" >&2; exit 2; }
